title: Kinetic Typography Canvas
description: An interactive kinetic typography engine that fractures text into individual character nodes, repelling them from the cursor via 2D Euclidean proximity mapping with spring-back relaxation dynamics.
author: Girish Madarkar
features: Granular character-span tokenization preserving whitespace via
High-frequency 2D Euclidean distance scanning on every mousemove frame
Radial proximity force vector with rotational tilt and scale amplification
Exponential spring-back relaxation smoothing via lerp interpolation
Live input console with custom text injection and preset streaming
Real-time diagnostics overlay showing active character counts
